data.body: REUSE (op-cert drift, 2026-07-13): era-scoped key validity is already shipped in src/rebar/attest/authorship.py (validity as commit-ancestry positions added_at_commit/revoked_at_commit, compared via 'git merge-base --is-ancestor'; verdict key_not_valid_at_era is in schemas/verify_signature_result.schema.json). Re-scope this task to REUSE that mechanism for the environment keyring, not build a parallel one — likely a thin adapter. Consider folding into child 368c if little unique work remains. See proposal comment on epic sonic-columned-sturgeon.
